elasticmapreduce.instancegroupconfig.sca: `ScalingTrigger` is a subproperty of the `ScalingRule` property type. `ScalingTrigger` determines the conditions that trigger an automatic scaling activity.

elasticmapreduce.instancegroupconfig.sca.Description: The definition of a CloudWatch metric alarm. When the defined alarm conditions are met along with other trigger parameters, scaling activity begins.
